title: Point Reyes Light — July 18, 1991 (Page 8)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated July 18, 1991, Page 8. This issue postdates PKD's death in 1982 and likely relates to retrospective coverage or community items connected to his legacy or former residence in the area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, July 18, 1991, page 8. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This clipping dates from nearly a decade after Dick's death in March 1982. By 1991, Dick's posthumous reputation was growing significantly, fueled by the continued influence of Blade Runner (1982) and the publication of previously unpublished works. A clipping from Dick's former Marin County community during this period of posthumous reassessment may document local remembrances or cultural coverage of his growing legacy.
